title: Levet (clone)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the clone trooper|the [[Levet|Mandalorian]] who went by the name}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Levet
CC-3388/0021 |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] ([[Cloning/Legends|clone]]) |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[35th Infantry]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Farming looks quite challenging. I like the open spaces.|Levet, to [[Etain Tur-Mukan]] during his time on [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]]|''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]''}} '''Levet''' formerly known as '''CC-3388/0021''', also joking referred to as '''Commander Tactful''', was a [[Clone Commander/Legends|clone commander]] stationed on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Qiilura/Legends|Qiilura]] under [[Jedi General/Legends|General]] [[Etain Tur-Mukan]] in [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]]. He commanded the [[35th Infantry]] there while General Tur-Mukan attempted to negotiate with [[Human/Legends|Human]] colonists there, as the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] was being blackmailed by the native [[Gurlanin]]s into leaving the planet. When most of the Human colonists refused, Levet was forced to use the full capability of the 35th Infantry upon them. The colonists were forced to be evacuated at gunpoint, with many civilians casualties. With the task completed, Levet and the 35th infantry moved on to nearby [[Gaftikar]] to assist [[Omega Squad]], [[A'den Skirata|Null-12]], and the local [[Marit]]s with capturing the capital city, [[Eyat]]. After [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], he deserted the GAR in favor of joining [[Kal Skirata]] on [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]]. When Skirata offered Levet asylum, Levet told him that he wanted a [[Farm/Legends|farm]] on the world. While on Mandalore, Levet got [[Levet's farm|his farm]], though he had trouble learning how to make it prosper, as he had only an instructional video for demonstration. Located a short distance from [[Kyrimorut/Legends|Kyrimorut]], he and the men of [[Yayax Squad]] worked to supply the rest of [[Clan Skirata]] with food and supplies. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|They don't call me Commander Tactful for nothing...|Levet|}} Levet was nicknamed Commander Tactful by his troops. He knew enough [[Mando'a/Legends|''Mando'a'']] to inform [[Ordo Skirata|Null-11]] that he knew of [[Etain Tur-Mukan|Etain's]] pregnancy without informing a nearby [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]], despite the fact that he had not been trained by a Mandalorian Cuy'val Dar''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]'' ==Appearances== *''[[Republic Commando: True Colors]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Order 66: A Republic Commando Novel]]'' *''[[Imperial Commando: 501st]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=CC-3388/0021 }} [[Category:Clone trooper commanders]] [[Category:Farmers]] [[Category:Galactic Republic deserters]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Members of the 35th Infantry]]
